webView.serviceNotRunningDesc: Please start the web service before accessing the web interface.

mirror.title: NPM Mirror Configuration
mirror.info: NPM tools will automatically use this mirror for faster downloads

navigation.officialWebsiteDesc: Visit Hagicode official website for latest news and documentation

about.sectionDescription: Render the bundled snapshot first, then refresh the latest official destinations in place.
about.loading: Refreshing the latest official about data...
about.refreshFailed: The latest official about data failed to load. Showing the bundled snapshot instead.
about.loadFailed: Official about data is temporarily unavailable, but the website entry still works.
about.snapshotMissing: This build does not include a bundled about snapshot. Trying the live endpoint directly.
about.empty: No official about entries are available right now.

npmManagement.title: npm Management
npmManagement.description: Inspect the Desktop embedded Node/npm environment and manage common npm CLI tools.

environment.title: Node Environment
environment.description: Desktop uses an isolated Node/npm runtime for managed CLIs instead of reusing the system-wide environment.
environment.rationaleTitle: Why Desktop ships with a dedicated Node runtime

rationale.fixedRuntime: A dedicated Node runtime with a fixed version lets Hagicode and its toolchain run against a known-good version, which improves stability across different host machines.
rationale.isolatedConfig: CLI-related configuration is stored separately from host-wide global configuration so updates, switching, and recovery keep a stable and usable config surface.
rationale.nonIntrusive: This isolation avoids polluting the host environment, and uninstalling Desktop will not disturb the Node, npm, or config that already existed on the machine.

mirror.title: npm Mirror Acceleration
mirror.description: Enable npmmirror.com for managed npm package sync and install operations.
mirror.enabledHelp: Upcoming sync/install operations will use the npmmirror.com registry mirror.
mirror.disabledHelp: Upcoming npm operations will use the default npm registry behavior.

hagiscript.description: Required package orchestration CLI used to synchronize Desktop-managed npm tools.

openspec.description: OpenSpec proposal, spec, and task workflow CLI.

omniroute.description: OmniRoute local routing and toolchain CLI.

claudeCode.description: Claude Code Agent CLI for AI-assisted coding sessions.

codex.description: OpenAI Codex Agent CLI for coding workflows.

githubCopilot.description: GitHub Copilot CLI distributed through the official @github/copilot npm package.

codebuddy.description: CodeBuddy CLI distributed through the official @tencent-ai/codebuddy-code npm package.

opencode.description: OpenCode Agent CLI distributed through the opencode-ai npm package.

qoder.description: QoderCLI distributed through the official @qoder-ai/qodercli npm package.

gemini.description: Google Gemini CLI distributed through the official @google/gemini-cli npm package.

dependencyGate.title: Install hagiscript first
dependencyGate.missing: Non-hagiscript package actions are disabled until hagiscript is installed in the Desktop-managed npm environment.
dependencyGate.unknown: Desktop cannot verify hagiscript right now. Refresh or reinstall hagiscript before changing other npm packages.

packageTable.title: Managed npm packages
packageTable.description: Select Agent CLI and workflow packages to install through hagiscript npm-sync.

batchLog.title: Batch install log
batchLog.empty: Logs will appear here after the batch install starts.

disabled.unknown: This package status is unknown. Refresh before selecting or installing it.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load npm management status

loading.title: Finishing first-launch initialization...
loading.summary: Preparing the Desktop bridge, local configuration, and data directory.
loading.description: The app shell stays visible until the critical startup dependencies are ready, so packaged first launch never drops to a blank window.

error.title: First launch did not finish
error.description: Desktop could not prepare the local resources required for the first screen.

toasts.restoreFailed: Failed to restore the default data directory
toasts.logsFailed: Failed to open the Desktop logs folder

systemDiagnostic.title: System Diagnostic
systemDiagnostic.description: Collect this device's local environment details and share the plain text report with technical support.
systemDiagnostic.reportDescription: Each rerun replaces the previous report so the copied content always reflects the newest diagnostic snapshot.
systemDiagnostic.empty: Run a system diagnostic to capture operating system, hardware, Agent CLI registry probes, and core toolchain details.

boundary.title: Local machine diagnostics only
boundary.description: This page collects plain-text environment details from the current device so you can share them with technical support.

partialFailure.title: Some checks did not finish cleanly
partialFailure.description: The report is still usable. {{count}} item(s) were marked as missing or failed, and their reasons were appended to the report.

error.title: Diagnostic run failed
error.description: Desktop could not complete this diagnostic run: {{error}}

logQuickAccess.title: Log Quick Access
logQuickAccess.description: Open the Desktop and Web App log folders directly to shorten diagnostics time.
logQuickAccess.hint: Button states refresh automatically with the active version

desktop.label: Desktop Logs Folder
desktop.description: Open the current Desktop logs directory on this device.

webApp.label: Web App Logs Folder
webApp.description: Open the Web App logs directory for the active version.

errors.load_failed: Failed to load log folder status

noVersionInstalled.title: No Versions Installed Yet
noVersionInstalled.description: The easiest way to get started with Hagicode Desktop is through our guided setup wizard. Complete installation and configuration in just a few steps.

descriptions.checking: Checking the active package source for a compatible newer version.
descriptions.downloading: A newer version was found and the archive is being predownloaded in the background.
descriptions.ready: The latest archive is verified and ready for the existing version-management install flow.
descriptions.settings-disabled: Background predownloads are disabled. You can turn them back on in Settings.
descriptions.portable-mode: Portable mode skips background updates and keeps the current runtime read-only.
descriptions.no-package-source: No active package source is configured, so background updates cannot start.

hero.title: Welcome to the homepage
hero.description: This top section summarizes service health and helps you understand where to start on the Desktop dashboard.

updateReminder.title: Track available updates
updateReminder.description: When a compatible newer package is discovered, this reminder card shows its state and links to the next action.

serviceCard.title: Monitor service status
serviceCard.description: Review the embedded service state here, then start, stop, restart, or open Hagicode when the runtime is ready.

logAccess.title: Jump to log folders
logAccess.description: These quick actions open Desktop and Web App log folders so you can collect evidence faster during diagnostics.

activeVersion.title: Review the active version
activeVersion.description: This section shows which package is installed right now and gives you a quick route into version management.

noVersionInstalled.title: Install your first version
noVersionInstalled.description: When no package is installed yet, use this call to action to launch the setup wizard and complete the first runtime install.
